name: UwsEdwClmInvtryAgeCatDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH MainCTE AS (SELECT CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_SK, 'UWS' AS SRC_SYS_CD, CLM_MIN_AGE, CLM_MAX_AGE, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_DESC, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT WHERE CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_SK <> 0 AND CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_SK <> 1), UNKRow AS (SELECT 0 AS CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_SK, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS CLM_MIN_AGE, 0 AS CLM_MAX_AGE, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '' AS CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_DESC, 'UNK' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK), NARow AS (SELECT 1 AS CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_SK, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, 0 AS CLM_MIN_AGE, 0 AS CLM_MAX_AGE, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '' AS CLM_INVTRY_AGE_CAT_DESC, 'NA' AS USER_ID, '1753-01-01' AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK) SELECT * FROM MainCTE UNION ALL SELECT * FROM UNKRow UNION ALL SELECT * FROM NARow
